title: PMID Ledger
description: Schema for _pmid_ledger.json — persistent tracking of every PMID encountered during KG build/update cycles

kg_name.description: Folder name of the knowledge graph, prefixed with KG_

created.description: ISO date when the ledger was first created

updated.description: ISO date of the most recent ledger update

entries.description: Map of PMID string to entry object. Keyed by PMID for O(1) dedup lookup.

title.description: Article title (null if metadata was not retrieved)

disposition.description: Current status: used (assigned to node), irrelevant (retrieved but not used), failed (evaluation failed), superseded (replaced during remediation)

first_seen.description: ISO timestamp when this PMID was first encountered

last_checked.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent interaction with this PMID

assigned_nodes.description: Node IDs this PMID is assigned to (empty for irrelevant/failed)

evidence_tier.description: Evidence tier classification (null if not classified)

publication_types.description: PubMed publication type tags (e.g., ['Journal Article', 'Randomized Controlled Trial']). Primary source for evidence tier classification. Null if metadata was not retrieved.

journal.description: Journal name (null if metadata was not retrieved)

year.description: Publication year (null if metadata was not retrieved)

authors.description: Article author list (null if metadata was not retrieved)

notes.description: Free-text notes (e.g., reason for irrelevance, failure details)
